body.title: Plug cloud escape gaps: analyze recent un-habited escalations and build habits
body.result: Seeded three cloud escape plugs: (1) Fixed book-project habit (20260325120926040135) — added habit_type='response' (was NULL, caused 49 escapes), (2) Seeded PROC_GREET_AKIEN response habit for greeting inputs, (3) Seeded PROC_CC_INFO_ACK response habit for CC info messages. All live in Postgres. Expected to close ~70% (130 of 189) current un-habited escalations. 1852 tests pass.
body.description: Igor has been self-observing cloud escalations without habits firing. Run the plug-building loop: read escalation_stats topics from the last 48h, identify the 3-5 most common patterns, and seed habits that intercept them locally before reaching tier.2. Use memory_search + find_tool for factual/tool queries. Forensic log to ~/.TheIgors/logs/plug_building.log. Not changing: tier routing logic, escalation thresholds.
